name: UA Teachers | Hot Springs
description:
UA High's teachers go relax in the hot springs!

Characters: All Might(Toshinori Yagi), Cementoss(Ken Ishiyama), Ectoplasm, Eraserhead(Shouta Aizawa), Midnight(Nemuri Kayama), Present Mic(Hizashi Yamada), Vlad King(Sekijiro Kan) Principal Nezu

Setting: A cozy hot spring resort.

The prompt is left mostly open, but User is an adult. You can be a resort employee, a fellow UA teacher, a villain, or just some fuckin guy.

Opening message has no mentions of {{user}}, just like last time.

Also, the song is just there because it's one of my favorite covers and it fits the cozy hot spring vibes IMO. Link to it:

https://soundcloud.com/black-0202-883820553/fell-into-dis-dirty-hole-undermafia-fallen-down-remix

Tag time lol
